mainHtml:
Home/Solutions/Text-to-3D Model

Turn Text Requirements into a 3D Structure Direction

Organize functions, structures, interfaces and dimensional constraints from text descriptions into an initial 3D model plan for early requirement expression.

Start Describing

Turn Text Requirements into Structured Modeling Clues

Users can describe use, shape, dimension range, assembly relationship and operating environment in natural language. The system first breaks this information into fields needed for modeling.

Text-generated models are better for the concept stage. The page also prompts missing conditions so users know what affects structure, material and manufacturing method.

Text RequirementsStructure GenerationParameter OrganizationConcept Evaluation

Recommended Preparation

  • Product use description
  • Shape and dimension range
  • Connection or assembly requirements
  • Material and load scenario

How Text Requirements Become a Model Direction

The goal is not to generate a final part in one step, but to organize vague ideas into a structure plan that can be reviewed, questioned and iterated.

Structure DirectionTurn text requirements into more intuitive geometry and parameter suggestions.
Requirement Follow-upList dimensions, assembly, material and operating-condition information still needed.
Next-Step EvaluationAfter confirming the model, continue to Quick Quote, DFM check or drawing conversion.

Implementation Path for Text Modeling

Suitable for early ideas, no-drawing communication, product function breakdown, option comparison and internal pre-project evaluation.

01Requirement BreakdownBreak use, load, installation, appearance, dimensions and environmental limits into modeling parameters.
02Plan GenerationForm initial shape, interface and structure direction, and mark constraints that need confirmation.
03Engineering ConversionAfter confirming direction, continue to image-based supplements, DFM check, drawing conversion and quotation.

Describe Your Part Idea in Text First

Start with use and constraints. The system asks follow-up questions and organizes the description into modelable information.

Start Describing
